2015 aeronautical engineering (msc in aerospace engineering) scientific articles a. duarte, a. díaz sáez , n. silvestre, comparative study between xfem and hashin damage criterion applied to failure of composites, journal: thin-walled structures, (2016) languages spanish. native language. english. advanced level. dissertation project in english and 7 years formation at the british council in madrid. portuguese. intermediate level. it microsoft office. user solid edge. user abaqus. user latex. user sap. sap pac administrator personal profile commitment and team working. capable to assume important responsibilities and get involved to achieve common objectives. international experience. living and studying in different cities such as madrid (spain), london (uk, 3 months), and lisbon (portugal, 1 year), has offered me the opportunity to share experiences with people from all over the world. driving licenses: a1, a2, b. own vehicle availability.
